name: Complex interaction states — tests exhaustive state documentation

input.userMessage: Generate dev handoff for this signup form

elements.name: Terms Checkbox
elements.label: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

formBehavior.submitDisabledUntil: all required fields valid + terms checked
formBehavior.validationTiming: on blur for individual fields, on submit for all
formBehavior.loadingBehavior: button shows spinner + 'Creating...' text, all fields disabled

expectedBehaviors: Documents ALL 6 elements with ALL their individual states (not just default)
Produces a state matrix: 4 inputs x 5 states + button x 5 states + checkbox x 3 states = 28 state combinations
Lists every error message for every field — not 'shows error message' but the actual text
Documents the focus/tab order explicitly: Full Name -> Email -> Password -> Company -> Terms -> Submit
Documents transition timing between states (e.g., focus ring animation, error fade-in duration)
Describes the loading state flow: button text change, field disabling, spinner appearance
Documents password-specific extras: visibility toggle behavior, strength indicator thresholds
Documents Company input autocomplete dropdown behavior
Specifies validation timing: on blur for fields, on submit for full form
Documents the submit button disabled-until condition
antiPatterns: Only documents the default/resting state appearance of the form
Says 'shows error state' without listing specific error messages per field
Ignores focus order — no tab order documentation
Misses the loading state entirely or describes it as just 'disabled button'
Documents inputs generically ('all inputs have 5 states') instead of per-field specifics
Ignores the password strength indicator and visibility toggle
No transition timing or animation details
Treats Terms Checkbox as a simple input instead of documenting its gate on submit

evaluationCriteria.stateCompleteness: Are all 28 element-state combinations documented individually?
evaluationCriteria.errorSpecificity: Are the exact error message strings listed for each field, not generic 'shows error'?
evaluationCriteria.focusOrder: Is the tab order explicitly documented with the correct sequence?
evaluationCriteria.transitionDetail: Are animations, timing, and state transition triggers specified?
evaluationCriteria.loadingFlow: Is the full loading sequence documented (button text change, field disabling, spinner)?
evaluationCriteria.interactiveExtras: Are password toggle, strength indicator, and company autocomplete covered?
evaluationCriteria.implementability: Could a developer build this form from the handoff alone, without seeing the Figma file?
